subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Abhá Beauty! In truth, during the past year, the loved ones of Nayríz drained the brimming cup of tribulation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی فی الحقیقه در سنه ماضیه احبای نیریز از صهبای بلا جام لبریز
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
